title: Happy regulation pattern
text: Happy states often show higher valence, moderate to high energy, easier social approach and more flexible attention. Helpful media can reinforce gratitude, connection and playful novelty without overstimulation.

title: Sad support pattern
text: Sad states often show low valence, low energy, social withdrawal and slower decision making. Helpful recommendations should feel gentle, hopeful, human and not demand too much attention.

title: Anger de-escalation pattern
text: Anger patterns often combine high stress, high energy and strong brow tension. Helpful content should lower arousal, offer perspective and avoid provocative or chaotic material.

title: Fear grounding pattern
text: Fearful states often include high stress, wide eyes, higher energy and threat scanning. Helpful recommendations should be grounding, predictable, warm and confidence-building.

title: Surprise curiosity pattern
text: Surprise usually blends high eye openness, mouth openness and alert energy. Helpful content can channel that activation into curiosity, discovery and light wonder.

title: Calm maintenance pattern
text: Calm states show low stress, steady attention and moderate valence. Helpful content should preserve steadiness, offer reflective pleasure and avoid heavy emotional spikes.

title: Stress relief pattern
text: Stress patterns combine high pressure, high energy, narrowed attention and body tension. Helpful recommendations should reduce cognitive load and support recovery.

title: Confusion clarity pattern
text: Confusion often includes mixed valence, unclear body signals and uneven attention. Helpful recommendations should be simple, structured and gently engaging.
